raw_consumer_statement:
CFPB Ref No : XXXX Ref : XXXX Account Ending in XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a letter from XXXX XXXX with American Express informing me that my disputed charge of {$960.00} to Home Depot was re-billed to my account. In the letter, XXXX XXXX did not acknowledge my certified letter which was received on XX/XX/XXXX by American Express ; however XXXX XXXX did explain that American Express would be able to re-dispute the charge if I provided them with communication I had with the merchant showing that I attempted a return. In XXXX XXXX 's letter, he specifically requested that I provide him with my communication sent to the merchant on XX/XX/XXXX- which was the same date that the incorrect XXXX  was installed in our condo and the first date I have written communication with the merchant. 

I am attaching my XX/XX/XXXX email message with attached photos which was sent to the merchant 's XXXX customer service department and received by the merchant. I am also attaching XXXX XXXX 's letter of XX/XX/XXXX. 

I kindly ask that American Express re-open this dispute as I have provided extensive written and photographic evidence that I did not receive the item I purchased from the merchant and contacted the merchant IN WRITING on the very same day I received the INCORRECT item - XX/XX/XXXX. The merchant REFUSED to pick up the incorrect item and re-deliver the item I purchased. 

I will be following up on this investigation with certified letters to both the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau as well as American Express. 

Thank you, XXXX XXXX
